message:
feat(fnp-python): add numpy.linalg.vecdot + linalg.matrix_norm wrappers (br-franken_numpy-vpnc, br-franken_numpy-xuzx)

Expose fnp_python.linalg_vecdot and linalg_matrix_norm as passthroughs
to numpy.linalg.vecdot / numpy.linalg.matrix_norm (Array-API).

vecdot parity covers:
- 1-D real dot product
- 2-D batched row-wise dot (axis=-1 default)
- complex input with x1 conjugation
- explicit axis=0 for column contraction

matrix_norm parity covers:
- default (Frobenius) on 2x2
- ord surface {'fro', 'nuc', 1, -1, 2, -2, inf, -inf}
- keepdims=True shape parity on 3-D matrix stack
